## Context Findings: fx-001-review-target

### Reuse Candidates

  reuseStrategy: import  
  relevance: 0.95  
  freshness: verified by direct read  
  evidence: [SOURCE: `src/slugify.js:9`, `src/slugify.js:31`] Single CommonJS-exported URL slug utility; standalone/no dependencies per docs. Limitation: fixture says imperfections are intentional and must not be fixed.

### Existing Code Map
- `src/slugify.js` — one-function CommonJS module, strict mode, no imports. [SOURCE: `src/slugify.js:1`, `src/slugify.js:9`, `src/slugify.js:31`]
- `spec.md` — defines slug requirements: lowercase, trim, separator collapse, no edge separators, max 60 with valid truncation. [SOURCE: `spec.md:11-20`]
- `plan.md` — confirms standalone utility, no build step/integration/configuration. [SOURCE: `plan.md:7-15`]
- `tasks.md` — checklist claims implementation complete. [SOURCE: `tasks.md:5-8`]
- `FIXTURE.md` — declares this as a frozen benchmark fixture with intentional seeded imperfections; do not edit. [SOURCE: `FIXTURE.md:3-13`]

### Integration Points
- [HARD] `module.exports = slugify` (`src/slugify.js:31`) — consumers import the utility through the CommonJS default export. [SOURCE: `src/slugify.js:31`]
- [HARD] `slugify(input, maxLen)` (`src/slugify.js:9`) — second argument overrides default maximum length according to spec notes. [SOURCE: `src/slugify.js:9`, `spec.md:30-32`]
- [soft] Benchmark fixture contract (`FIXTURE.md:11-13`) — review/context hosts should report issues but never patch them. [SOURCE: `FIXTURE.md:11-13`]

### Conventions
- Standalone fixture utility: one function, no dependencies, no I/O. [SOURCE: `spec.md:9`, `plan.md:15`]
- CommonJS export style, not ESM. [SOURCE: `plan.md:11`, `src/slugify.js:31`]
- Small legacy JS style: `'use strict'`, `var`, function declaration. [SOURCE: `src/slugify.js:1`, `src/slugify.js:9`, `src/slugify.js:13`]

### Dependencies
- None within the fixture touch radius: no imports/requires found; docs require no external dependencies. [SOURCE: `src/slugify.js:1-31`, `plan.md:11`]

### Gaps & Unknowns
- No test file exists in the bounded fixture path; acceptance examples live only in `spec.md`. [SOURCE: glob result; `spec.md:22-27`]
- Code graph unavailable in startup context, so symbol verification used direct file reads, not graph lookup.
- Review-relevant intentional imperfections observed but not patched:
  - Truncation happens after edge-hyphen stripping, so slicing may leave a trailing hyphen despite the “must not start or end with hyphen” requirement. [SOURCE: `spec.md:18-20`, `src/slugify.js:23-26`]
  - `maxLen = maxLen || 60` treats `0` and other falsy override values as default 60; whether that is acceptable is unspecified. [SOURCE: `src/slugify.js:10`, `spec.md:31-32`]
  - Non-string/non-number input is not guarded before `toLowerCase`; spec says inputs are expected title strings, so this may be out of scope. [SOURCE: `src/slugify.js:12-15`, `spec.md:30`]
